prompt: A young woman with shoulder-length dark brown wavy hair sitting cross-legged on a wooden bench/stool, eating a cartoon-style burger with her right hand raised to her mouth. She wears round gold-framed reflective sunglasses, a white oversized graphic t-shirt featuring a cartoon illustration print on the chest, baggy distressed teal/denim wide-leg pants with ripped knees, and chunky platform sandals — left foot in blue and red sandal, right foot in red sandal with visible red-painted toenails. She holds a red cartoon soda cup with a red straw in her left hand. Surrounding her are floating comic-style fast food elements: an animated crying cheeseburger bottom-left, a cartoon french fries box top-left dripping red sauce with hearts, and a cartoon soda cup. The background is a real photographic urban outdoor setting with glass storefront, trees, cloudy blue sky, and tiled floor. The art style blends realistic photography with vibrant 2D cartoon/comic illustration overlays on the food items and clothing. Small white sparkle/star doodles scattered across the frame. Bright, high saturation colors, fun and playful pop-art street style mood.
